Why Terraloma

León made.
World delivered.

León, Guanajuato is the leather capital of Latin America — where master artisans have spent generations perfecting the craft of the boot. Most distributors have never set foot there.

We have. Terraloma was built on direct relationships with the workshops of León. Better quality, honest pricing, and a supply chain you can actually trust.

01

Direct workshop access

We source directly from artisan workshops in León — zero intermediaries between the maker and your store.

02

Genuine craftsmanship

Classic and exotic leather styles made with traditional techniques that mass production cannot replicate.

03

Wholesale pricing

Real factory-level pricing — the kind that makes your margins as a retailer actually worth it.

How It Works

Simple. Direct. Reliable.

1

Leave your info

Fill out the contact form below and tell us what you're looking for.

2

We reach out

We review your inquiry and contact you directly within 24 hours.

3

Select & Quote

Choose models, sizes and quantities. We prepare your wholesale quotation.

4

Ship Worldwide

Your boots ship from Guanajuato — USA, Canada, Brazil, Australia, and more.

The Terraloma Advantage

What you get
with every order.

✦

Workshop-direct pricing

We go straight to the source in León. You get margins that make reselling worth it.

✦

Verified artisan quality

Every pair is inspected before leaving León. Classic and exotic, both meet our standard.

✦

Flexible minimum orders

Boutique or large retailer — we work with your volume. Starting small is fine.

✦

Personal account management

You work directly with us. Fast responses, transparent communication, real relationships.
